mechanics.excerpt: Their fellow Clans abjured them for their treason and seized their holdings Clan space. Clan Ghost Bear; which chose not to fight the Trial, has also become permanent presence in the Inner Sphere_ They now occupy the Ghost Bear Dominion, part of what was once the Free Rasalhague Republic from which they guard the Inner Sphere against incursions by Crusader-minded Clans unwilling to accept defeat: What other plans they ay have remain anyone guess. 185
